title.en: LUBRICATING

definition.ko: 윤활을 확실하게 하기 위한 장치 또한 기계의 개량 F16N1/00 윤활 장치 고정된 것; 운반할수 있는 것; 수동인것 F16N7/00, F16N11/00; 9/00; 3/00, F16N5/00 윤활 펌프 F16N13/00 세부; 저장기, 도관류, 첵밸브(CHECK VALVE) F16N19/00, F16N21/00, F16N23/00 분배, 비열, 안전, 제어, 정화를 위한 설비 F16N23/00 ～ 33/00 윤활제의 취급, 저장 F16N33/00 ～ 39/00 특수윤활 F16N15/00, F16N17/00 이 서브 클래스의 다른 그룹으로 분류되지 않는 기술 F16N99/00

title.en: Lubrication devices or arrangements for oil or grease
Constructional modifications of parts of machines or apparatus for the purpose of lubrication
Devices for supplying lubricant by manual action
delivering oil
Oil cans; Oil syringes
delivering on squeezing
incorporating a piston-pump
delivering grease
Grease guns

title.ko: 윤활제를 압력에 의하여 공급하며, 수동으로 위치를 조절할 수 있는 노즐을 갖춘 장치(F16N 3/00이 우선)
title.en: Apparatus with hand-positioned nozzle supplied with lubricant under pressure (F16N0003000000 takes precedence)
Nozzles or nozzle-valve arrangements therefor, e.g. high-pressure grease guns

title.ko: 고정되어 있는 저장구 또는 그것에 상당하는 것으로부터 윤활하여야 할 기계 또는 부재에 기름 또는 특정하지 않는 윤활제를 공급하기 위한 장치
title.en: Arrangements for supplying oil or unspecified lubricant from a stationary reservoir or the equivalent in or on the machine or member to be lubricated
with gravity feed or drip lubrication
with oil flow promoted by vibration
Arrangements in which the droplets are visible
controlled by means of the temperature of the member to be lubricated
incorporating manually-operated control means, e.g. spindles
with feed by capillary action, e.g. by wicks

title.ko: 윤활제가 기계적수단에 의하여 저장용기로부터 운반되는 것(펌프장치에 의한 것 F16N 7/36, F16N 7/38)
title.en: the lubricant being conveyed from the reservoir by mechanical means (by pumping devices F16N0007360000, F16N0007380000)
the oil being carried up by a lifting device
with one or more feed members fixed on a shaft
with one or more members moving around the shaft to be lubricated
shaped as rings
with discs, rollers, belts, or the like contacting the shaft to be lubricated
Splash lubrication
Dip lubrication
the oil being fed or carried along by another fluid
Mist lubrication
Atomising devices for oil
with feed by pumping action of the member to be lubricated or of a shaft of the machine; Centrifugal lubrication
with a separate pump; Central lubrication systems
in a closed circulation system

title.ko: 움직이는 오일저장소 또는 그에 상당하는 것으로부터 오일 또는 비특정 윤활제를 공급하기 위한 장치(고정저장소를 함께 사용가능한 것 F16N 7/00)
title.en: Arrangements for supplying oil or unspecified lubricant from a moving reservoir or the equivalent (also usable with a stationary reservoir F16N0007000000)
with reservoir on or in a rotary member
with reservoir on or in a reciprocating, rocking, or swinging member

title.ko: 고정저장소 또는 그에 상당하는 것으로부터 윤활 하여야 할 기계나 부재속에 또는 위에 그리스를 공급하기 위한 장치; 그리스 컵(Grease cup)
title.en: Arrangements for supplying grease from a stationary reservoir or the equivalent in or on the machine or member to be lubricated; Grease cups
Hand-actuated grease cups, e.g. Stauffer cups
Spring-loaded devices
Weight-loaded devices

title.ko: 기계적구동으로 공급되는, 직접 스프링 또는 추에 의하지 않는 것(윤활펌프 F16N 13/00)
title.en: with mechanical drive, other than directly by springs or weights (lubricating-pumps F16N0013000000)
by pressure of another fluid
by centrifugal action
Lubricating-pumps (oil cans with pump F16N0003080000)

title.ko: 왕복피스톤을 갖는 것(분배장치를 갖춘 펌프 F16N 13/02)
title.en: with reciprocating piston (pumps with distributing equipment F16N0013220000)
Adjustable reciprocating pumps
Actuation of lubricating-pumps
by hand
with mechanical drive (F16N0013180000 takes precedence)
with ratchet
with cam or wobble-plate on shaft parallel to the pump cylinder or cylinders
with fluid drive
relative movement of pump parts being produced by inertia of one of the parts or of a driving member
Rotary pumps (with distributing equipment F16N0013220000)
with distributing equipment

title.ko: 오일 또는 그리스 이외의 물질에 의한 윤활; 특정 장치 또는 조건에 있어서 특정 윤활제의 사용에 특징이 있는 윤활 (F16N17/00이 우선; 윤활용 조합물, 특수물질의 윤활제로서의 선택일반 C10M)
title.en: Lubrication with substances other than oil or grease; Lubrication characterised by the use of particular lubricants in particular apparatus or conditions (F16N0017000000 takes precedence;lubricating compositions, selection of particular substances as lubricants in general C10M)
with graphite or graphite-containing compositions
with water

title.ko: 극단적인 조건아래에서 작동하는 기계 또는 장치의 윤활유 또는 윤활 그리스의 첨가제 C10M
title.en: Lubrication of machines or apparatus working under extreme conditions (additives to lubricating oil or lubricating grease C10M)
at high temperature
at low temperature

title.ko: 진공 또는 저온에 있어서의 것( X-선관의 회전양극의 윤활 H01J 35/10)
title.en: in vacuum or under reduced pressure (of rotary anodes of X-ray tubes H01J0035100000)
Details of lubricators or lubrication systems
Lubricant containers for use in lubricators or lubrication systems
Conduits; Junctions; Fittings for lubrication apertures
Lubricating nipples
Nozzles for connection of lubricating equipment to nipples
Covering members for nipples, conduits, or apertures
Special adaptations of check valves
Distributing equipment (combined with oil pump F16N0013220000)
with reciprocating distributing slide valve
with rotary distributing member
Proportioning devices
Gating equipment
Special means in lubricating arrangements or systems providing for the indication or detection of undesired conditions; Use of devices responsive to conditions in lubricating arrangements or systems
for influencing the supply of lubricant
enabling a warning to be given; enabling moving parts to be stopped

title.ko: 기계 또는 장치속에서 또는 위에서 윤활제를 모아서 지지하거나 또는 제거하기 위한 수단
title.en: Means for collecting, retaining, or draining-off lubricant in or on machines or apparatus

title.ko: 오일 캐처(boil catcher) 오일와이퍼(oil wiper) (피스톤용 보일 스크랩핑 링(boil scraping ring))
title.en: Oil catchers; Oil wipers (oil-scraping rings for pistons F16J0009200000)
Mechanical arrangements for cleaning lubricating equipment; Special racks or the like for use in draining lubricant from machine parts
Care of lubricants
Storage of lubricants in engine-rooms or the like
Equipment for transferring lubricant from one container to another
for filling grease guns

title.ko: 윤활시스템에 있어서 윤활제 상태를 조정하기 위한 장치(윤활유의 청정 윤활조성물 G10M)
title.en: Arrangements for conditioning of lubricants in the lubricating system (cleaning of lubricating oil, lubricating compositions C10M)
by cooling
by heating
by filtration
by diluting, e.g. by addition of fuel
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
